Description:
Universal ammunition format used by Robotek Arms across the entire RA-series weapon line. Each pack contains a number of pre-charged cells. Standard packs hold ten; military packs hold thirty; industrial packs hold less and weigh more.

Robotek's "one round, every weapon" policy was adopted in 2390 after consolidation of three separate ammunition standards. The change was framed as a logistics improvement and is, in fact, a logistics improvement — but it has also produced a market in which any operator with any Robotek weapon competes for the same supply. Charge packs are accordingly the single most stolen item in the Inner Rim.

A charge pack found in the wild is rarely full. Looting tends to take the visible cells and leave the casing.
